rows.label: qev050506_MSG0001
rows.name: I am in your debt, my BLADE friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0002
rows.name:
I have been eagerly awaiting your return.
Were you able to gather the ingredients?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0003
rows.name:
Meat and vegetables...
Yes, these are things even we are familiar with seeing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, I suppose so.
That being said, I have a feeling you probably just
roast them as they are and call it a day...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0005
rows.name:
Even if curry is a quick and easy menu item,
I suppose I'll have to teach you properly from the very basics
of food preparation...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0006
rows.name: I... I leave myself in your capable hands...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0007
rows.name:
Well, I'm already involved in this.
Let's head to the kitchen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0008
rows.name: There, we managed to make it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0009
rows.name:
I taught him everything from A to Z in detail,
but I didn't actually lend a hand a single time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0010
rows.name:
So this finished curry is
something he made entirely on his own![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0011
rows.name:
I was actually surprised by how quickly he picked it up.
He's good with his hands, too...
Maybe he's suited to be a chef.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0012
rows.name:
Chef...
That is the term used to refer to someone assigned
to the department that creates food, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0013
rows.name:
That's right.
It's the title for one who brings happiness to people's hearts through food.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0014
rows.name: Ryōrinin...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0015
rows.name: Anyway, no matter what, we have to check the taste first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0016
rows.name: To start, the person who made it should take the first bite.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0017
rows.name: I should...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0018
rows.name:
You must first judge with your own tongue whether
it is something you can recommend to others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0019
rows.name:
Yes, that stands to reason.
...I understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0022
rows.name: Th... This is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0023
rows.name: How does it taste?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0024
rows.name:
The stimulating sensation when it touches the tongue...
The fiery texture as it passes down the throat...
The satisfying heft that strikes the pit of the stomach...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0025
rows.name:
And above all! 
This vivid flavor that strikes directly at the brain!
My heart dances! My spirit soars![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0026
rows.name: What... What kind of food is this?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0027
rows.name: Like I said, it's curry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0028
rows.name:
Delicious! So this is the sensation of "delicious"!
This is the pinnacle of happiness! This is utopia![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0029
rows.name:
You really do exaggerate...
I don't think it's a result worth making such a huge fuss over...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0030
rows.name: Then, I'll have a taste too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0033
rows.name:
...No way.
This is seriously delicious![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0034
rows.name:
No way... I can't believe it...
I've never eaten a curry this delicious before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0035
rows.name:
Madam, it is all thanks to you.
I feel as though I have touched upon... a fragment
of the true essence of what it means to cook.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0036
rows.name: Though I could not match His Highness in wielding a sword...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0037
rows.name:
But in the kitchen knife skills required to create
this curry! I shall not be inferior to His Highness![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0038
rows.name:
I have finally managed to stand on the same stage as His Highness.
For the first time... I have found a path of my own
that I can proudly show to His Highness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0039
rows.name: Madam, I thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0040
rows.name:
From now on, I will never forget the profound emotion
I felt at this very moment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0041
rows.name: And I intend to master my own path... as a chef.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0042
rows.name:
W-We just made curry, and yet...
You've attained some incredible level of enlightenment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0043
rows.name:
From finding my sword, to the recipes, to gathering the ingredients...
I have received tremendous assistance from you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0044
rows.name:
Just watch.
I will become a splendid chef, and when that time comes,
I will have you eat a meal made with all my strength![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0045
rows.name: I am truly grateful for everything you've done this time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0046
rows.name:
Come to think of it, I believe you came searching for me
at the request of someone from the Maintenance Center...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0047
rows.name:
But as you can see, now that I have found a new purpose,
I cannot return...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0048
rows.name:
I will speak to the staff member myself,
so please, accept this humble token of my gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0049
rows.name: Please, take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0050
rows.name:
Curry, huh...
It is a name with a most mysterious ring to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0051
rows.name:
Despite having it explained to me, the truth is,
I am not very familiar with this concept of "spices" in the first place, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050506_MSG0052
rows.name: Its true form remains a mystery to me.[ST:wait ]
